wind.head: headwind
provenance.observed: Actual weather observed on event day

notes.title: Technical notes
notes.data: Weather data comes from Open-Meteo (ECMWF and ICON models) and loads fresh every time the page opens. Missing values are shown as —, never invented.
error.unknownEvent: This event does not exist. See the list on the main page.
error.badRoute: The route for this event could not be read.
